name: Pantheon
playstyleSummary: Pantheon is an aggressive lane bully who dives onto enemies with a stunning dash, then finishes them off with a spear throw that executes low-health targets. He rewards understanding enemy cooldowns and timing over pure mechanical skill, since much of his kit is about picking the right moment to strike.
strengths: Shield Vault gives a reliable stun to start fights
Comet Spear can execute low-health enemies from range
Aegis Assault blocks all frontal damage, great for tanking incoming poke
weaknesses: Falls off in raw power compared to some other fighters as the game goes on
Aegis Assault only blocks damage from the front
Grand Starfall gives the enemy team a long warning before he lands
Needs to land Mortal Will's empowered spell well to maximize damage

abilities.name: Mortal Will
abilities.howToUseIt: Every 5 spells or attacks, your next spell gets empowered - plan your combo so the empowered cast lands during a real fight, not while just farming.

abilities.name: Comet Spear
abilities.howToUseIt: Thrust it for a quick poke, or throw it for a longer-range hit that can execute low-health enemies - save the throw to finish a low-health target rather than to start a fight.

abilities.name: Shield Vault
abilities.howToUseIt: Dash to an enemy to stun them - this is usually how you start a fight, so use it to open on an isolated target rather than someone surrounded by allies.

abilities.name: Aegis Assault
abilities.howToUseIt: Set your shield to become invulnerable to damage from the front while striking repeatedly - great for tanking a wave of poke or burst, but you can recast it early to fire off a shield slam if your target is about to escape.

abilities.name: Grand Starfall
abilities.howToUseIt: Leap into the air and land at a chosen location - it takes a few seconds to arrive, giving the enemy a warning, so use it to threaten multiple lanes or punish enemies who can't escape in time.

earlyGamePlan: Pantheon is strongest in the first several minutes, so trade aggressively - use Comet Spear's thrust to poke, then Shield Vault in when your opponent is low or out of position for a stun into extra damage. Try to end fights quickly, and don't be afraid to all-in early since your power fades in the late game.
quickTips: Use Shield Vault to open fights on isolated enemies, not ones near their allies
Save Comet Spear's thrown version to execute a fleeing, low-health target
Face Aegis Assault toward incoming damage - it only blocks hits from the front
Recast Aegis Assault early if your target is about to get out of range
Push your advantage early in the game since your power drops off later
Time your all-ins to spend your empowered Mortal Will spell in the fight
whatToExpect: Pantheon is dangerous early - expect him to trade aggressively and try to stun you with Shield Vault before finishing you with a thrown Comet Spear if your health gets low. If he activates Aegis Assault, get behind him or wait it out rather than trading face-to-face, since he's invulnerable to frontal damage while it's active; also watch the sky for Grand Starfall's warning so you can move out of the way before he lands.

glossary.definition: An effect that deals bonus or guaranteed damage to low-health targets, sometimes enough to kill them outright.
Dealing small amounts of damage from range before a real fight starts.
Committing fully to a fight rather than trading and backing off.
Separated from allies, making a target easier and safer to attack.
A large amount of damage dealt very quickly.
